DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS MARIA AND LUIS ALFARO'S (COLLECTIVELY THE "ALFAROS'") MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES AND TO STRIKE IMPROPER OBJECTIONS TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. THE ALFAROS' REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT RYAN CHAN (NOT COUNSEL) IS GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. ALL OTHER SANCTIONS, IF ANY, ARE DENIED. THE ALFAROS SHALL PREPARE A FORM OF THE ORDER RECAPITULATING THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SHALL STATE IN THE PROPOSED ORDER THE EXACT REMEDY SOUGHT AS AGAINST EACH PARTICULAR RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSION. JUDGE PRO TEM DOUGLAS ROBBINS, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Order Re: Motion To Compel Due To Lack Of Notice
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RYAN CHAN's Motion To Vacate Order Re: Motion To Compel Due To Lack Of Notice.

Transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar in room 301 on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Set For Trial On May-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Ryan Chan'S Motion To Vacate Order Re: Motion To Compel Due To Lack Of Notice
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Kirill B. Tarasenko of Tarasenko Law Firm 888-878-0830 ext 1 CourtCall appearance for Plaintiff. / Atty. Michael Daley of Phillip Andersen & Associates 925-225-6838 appeared for defendant.

Hearing Held - The Court rules, DEFENDANT RYAN CHAN'S Motion To Vacate Order Re: Motion To Compel Due To Lack Of Notice is granted. Order entered on December 23, 2019 is vacated. Plaintiffs Maria Alfaro and Luis Alfaro's Motion to compel further responses and to strike improper objections to requests for admission is re set for February 28, 2020. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses And To Strike Improper Objections To Request For Admission
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Kirill Tarasenko of Law Offices of Kirill Tarasenko 916-542-0201 appeared for plaintiff. No other appearances.

Hearing Held - The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiffs Maria and Luis Alfaro's (collectively the "Alfaros'") Motion to Compel Further Responses and to Strike Improper Objections to Requests for Admission is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. The Alfaros' request for monetary sanctions against Defendant Ryan Chan (not counsel) is GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. All other sanctions, if any, are DENIED. The Alfaros shall prepare a form of the order recapitulating this tentative ruling, shall state in the proposed order the exact remedy sought as against each particular Response to Request for Admission. Judge Pro Tem Douglas Robbins, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)
